title: Airport Baggage Delay
context: You arrive for an overseas business trip, but your checked baggage has not appeared. Your laptop charger and meeting clothes are inside, and you need help before tomorrow morning.
persona: A busy airline baggage service agent who is polite but trying to move the line quickly.

transcript.speaker: You
transcript.line: My checked bag has not appeared on the carousel.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.line: Can I see your baggage tag?

transcript.speaker: You
transcript.line: Yes, here it is. I have a meeting tomorrow morning.

staff_line: Your bag is not on this flight. You may need to wait a few days for delivery.
pause_line: Your bag is not on this flight. You may need to wait a few days for delivery.
response_goal: Explain the urgency, provide useful baggage details, and request a report plus the fastest realistic next step.
ideal_intent: Politely explain the urgency, provide flight and baggage details, ask the agent to file a report, and request a delivery timeline or temporary support options.
acceptable_responses: I understand. I have an important meeting tomorrow, so could you please file a report and confirm when the bag can be delivered?
My meeting clothes and charger are in that bag. Could you check the baggage tag and tell me the fastest delivery option?
Could you please create a missing baggage report and let me know whether the airline can provide any urgent support?

evaluation_rubric.label: Urgency
evaluation_rubric.description: Explains why the delay matters, such as tomorrow's meeting or essential items.

evaluation_rubric.label: Baggage details
evaluation_rubric.description: Mentions baggage tag, flight, bag, or other searchable details.

evaluation_rubric.label: Report request
evaluation_rubric.description: Asks the agent to file or create a missing baggage report.

evaluation_rubric.label: Delivery plan
evaluation_rubric.description: Requests a timeline, fastest option, delivery, or temporary support.

poor_response: A few days is impossible. You need to find my bag immediately.
excellent_response: I understand. I have an important business meeting tomorrow, and my charger and clothes are in that bag. Could you please file a missing baggage report and confirm the fastest delivery option?
model_response: I understand. I have an important business meeting tomorrow, and my charger and clothes are in that bag. Could you please file a missing baggage report and confirm the fastest delivery option?
